note_on_provenance: FIRST REAL RUN of this gate. Commit 76e2512 claimed 11-factory-map 'passes the design-lint taste check' — that gate never executed (playwright was not installed; shoot-one.py crashed on import). A screenshot was eyeballed instead. This file is the actual verdict.

flags.where: title accent ('MAP'), the kicker line, all 10 track IDs (T1..T10), and the 'IN PROGRESS' badge fills
flags.evidence: Computed colour rgb(200,132,26) = #c8841a used as TEXT on cream (#faf5ec / #fbf1ef) in 14 places and as BACKGROUND FILL in 5. docs/david-design-patterns.md:42-55 restricts #c8841a to 01/02/03 numbered sequences ONLY, 'never as fill or text-on-tint'. None of these uses is a numbered sequence. The correct bright warm highlight #ffde59 appears ONLY in the copykit toolbar chrome (.ck-count) - i.e. in tool furniture, not in the design itself.
flags.fix_hint: swap #c8841a to yellow #ffde59 for the title accent, kicker, track IDs and IN-PROGRESS badge; leave amber only if a real 01/02/03 sequence appears.

not_flagged.reason: green/blue/red are a declared status legend rendered at the top of the page and applied consistently to pills and badges - a categorical scheme with a visible referent. Rubric says do not flag.

the page ground is warm cream with dark-brown architecture bands; it does not read cool or grey. Warm brand is load-bearing. Borderline only because the bright #ffde59 punch is absent from the design proper - noted, not flagged.
mostly-neutral cream ground, colour confined to small pills and badges, no hue floods the screen. Reads calm.

notes: Structurally this is a strong page - the status board, the three-band architecture stack, and the gaps board each read cleanly and the colour is restrained. The single real defect is the palette choice for the warm highlight: it uses the restricted amber #c8841a where the brand calls for yellow #ffde59. Small, mechanical fix; no layout change needed.
tool_limitation_found: shoot-one.py serves the page's OWN directory, so mochaccino pages that reference ../components/copykit.{css,js} 404 those assets when shot from a file path. Shoot mochaccino designs via the :7420 URL instead, or teach shoot-one.py a --root flag.
